dialogue.text: Step aside, novice, we're doing business here.

listSelection.title: Hey, partner! If you have the right goods, I can turn it into something very nice...
So, what kind of weapon would you like me to forge?

dialogue.text:
You want me to make a #t2070018#? In that case, I'm going to need specific items from you in order to make it. Make sure you have room in your inventory, though!#b

Hey, I need those items to craft properly, you know?
All done. If you need anything else... Well, I'm not going anywhere.
